title: Timeline entries without sources or UTC timestamps
code_snippet:
## Timeline

14:23 Something went wrong
14:30 Someone noticed the problem
2:45pm Fixed it

// No sources, mixed time formats, vague descriptions
violated_rule: Timeline present with UTC timestamps — sequential, sourced entries
expected_feedback: Critical: timeline lacks sources and has inconsistent timestamps. Every entry must cite its source (PagerDuty, Grafana, Slack, etc.) and use UTC. '14:23 Something went wrong' is not actionable — specify what monitoring/log showed what signal. Convert '2:45pm' to UTC format.
